title: Welcome to Obsession Tracker
description: Learn the basics of using Obsession Tracker for GPS tracking and outdoor adventures

steps.title: Welcome to Obsession Tracker
steps.content: Welcome to Obsession Tracker! This app helps you track your outdoor adventures with privacy-first GPS tracking. Let's get you started with the basics.

steps.title: Navigation Basics
steps.content: Use the bottom navigation bar to switch between different sections: Home, Photos, Sessions, and Track. Each section has specific features for your outdoor adventures.

steps.title: Start Your First Track
steps.content: Tap the 'Track' tab to begin your first GPS tracking session. This is where you'll record your routes, add waypoints, and capture photo memories.

steps.title: Privacy First
steps.content: Your location data stays on your device. Obsession Tracker is designed with privacy in mind - your adventures are yours alone unless you choose to share them.

steps.title: Get Help Anytime
steps.content: Need help? Tap the help button in the navigation rail or use the floating help button for quick assistance. You're all set to start exploring!
